queue_item.action: Require separate proposal, review, application, and post-application freshness witnesses before canonical queue reconciliation.

progress.finding: Queue proposal integrity is not mutation-time freshness. Review and application must each rebind repository head and queue-update-tree state, then retain post-application verification.
progress.verification: Both artifacts received GitHub contents API commit acknowledgements; canonical queue remained unchanged.
progress.privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and operational artifacts only; no private chat, health, pet-health, credentials, contact data, or unreviewed uploads.

queue_item.handoff: Implement a queue reconciliation validator that computes the queue-update tree digest at proposal, review, and application time and fails closed on any mismatch or incomplete traversal.
